title: elymus × nothus
intro: Elymus × nothus, also known as a hybrid of Elymus caninus and Elymus junceus, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The health benefits of Elymus × nothus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Elymus × nothus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
